get.description: List all registered prompts.

schema.title: Response List Prompts Api Prompts  Get

get.description:
Return prompt config with provenance info.

Reads PromptConfig from DB. Returns both the effective (merged) config
per role and the raw overrides dict, so the UI can show Global/Override badges.

put.description:
Update per-prompt config in DB PromptConfig table.

Upserts the PromptConfig row. Stores role-prefixed fields in the extra
JSON column. Does NOT write config.json.

get.description: Get a prompt's full detail including template text from DB.
List all versions for a prompt, ordered by version number.

schema.title: Response List Versions Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Versions Get

get.description: Get a specific version of a prompt.

put.description: Activate a specific version for a prompt.

post.description:
Accept an evolved template as a new version.

Creates a new version from the provided template and sets it as active.
Used after evolution runs to accept the best evolved template.

get.description: List all test cases for a prompt.

schema.title: Response List Cases Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Dataset Get

post.description: Add a new test case to a prompt's dataset.

get.description: Get a single test case by ID.

put.description: Update an existing test case (partial update).

post.description: Import test cases from an uploaded JSON or YAML file.

schema.title: Response Import Cases Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Dataset Import Post

post.description:
Start an evolution run as a background task.

Loads the prompt and test cases, builds an EvolutionConfig,
and hands the coroutine to the RunManager.

get.description: List all currently active (in-memory) evolution runs.

schema.title: Response List Active Runs Api Evolution Active Get

get.description: Get the current status of an evolution run.
List evolution runs for a prompt, ordered by most recent first.

schema.title: Response Get History Api History  Prompt Id  Get

get.description:
Get full results for a completed evolution run by its UUID.

Used by the dashboard for live-to-completed transitions where
the frontend only has the RunManager UUID, not the DB integer ID.
Get a single evolution run by its database ID.

Get full results for a completed evolution run.

Returns lineage events, case results, seed case results,
best candidate ID, and best template for visualization.

List available models from the specified provider.

Returns cached results if a successful fetch occurred within the
last 5 minutes.  Missing API keys return 503; unknown providers
return 400; upstream failures return 502.

schema.title: Response List Models Api Models  Get

post.description: Generate a prompt template from wizard answers using the meta model.

Start a synthesis run as a background task.

Loads the prompt's personas, creates a SynthesisEngine, and launches
conversation simulation as a background asyncio task. Progress events
are published to the EventBus for WebSocket streaming.

Args:
    prompt_id: Prompt to synthesize test cases for.
    body: Synthesis configuration (persona_ids, num_conversations, max_turns).
    request: FastAPI request for accessing app state.
    config: Application configuration.
    registry: Prompt registry for loading prompt data.
    dataset_service: Dataset service for persisting test cases.

Returns:
    SynthesizeResponse with run_id and initial status.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 400 if no personas defined for the prompt.

Submit approve/reject decisions for synthesized conversations.

Retrieves the buffered synthesis result by run_id, persists approved
conversations as test cases via DatasetService, and discards rejected ones.
Cleans up the in-memory buffer after processing.

Args:
    prompt_id: Prompt to persist approved conversations to.
    body: Review decisions with run_id and per-conversation actions.
    request: FastAPI request for accessing app state.
    dataset_service: Dataset service for persisting test cases.

Returns:
    ReviewResponse with approved/rejected counts and persisted case IDs.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if the review session is not found or expired.

get.description: List all personas for a prompt. Returns defaults if no DB rows exist.

schema.title: Response List Personas Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Personas Get

post.description: Create a new persona for a prompt.

put.description: Update an existing persona's fields (partial update).

get.description: Export all personas as a JSON array.

schema.title: Response Export Personas Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Personas Export Get

post.description: Import personas from a JSON array, skipping existing IDs.

get.description:
Return current configuration with masked API keys.

Reads DB Setting rows (including encrypted API keys) and merges onto
GeneConfig defaults. Env var keys take priority over DB-stored keys.

put.description:
Update configuration in database and return new settings.

Only provided (non-None) fields are updated; others are preserved.
API key fields are encrypted and stored in the "api_keys" Setting category.
Non-key fields go to "global_config" as before.
The config cache is cleared so the next request picks up new values.

get.description: Return GeneConfig default values (for 'Reset to Defaults' feature).

post.description:
Validate an API key by making a lightweight request to the provider.

Attempts to list models from the provider. Returns success/failure.

get.description: List all presets, optionally filtered by type.

schema.title: Response List Presets Api Presets Get

get.description: Get a single preset by ID.

put.description: Mark a preset as default, clearing other defaults of the same type.

get.description: Return all saved variable values for a prompt from DB.

put.description:
Save variable values to DB (upsert per variable_name).

For each variable in the request, check if (prompt_id, variable_name)
exists; if yes update value, if no insert new row.

get.description: Return playground config (turn_limit, budget) for a prompt.

put.description: Update playground config (turn_limit, budget) for a prompt.

post.description:
Stream an LLM chat response via Server-Sent Events.

Loads the prompt template from DB, renders it with provided variables as the
system message, appends the conversation history, and streams the
target model's response token-by-token.

SSE events emitted:
- token: {"content": "..."} -- each streamed token
- done: {"input_tokens": N, "output_tokens": N, "cost_usd": F, "model": "...", "finish_reason": "..."} -- stream complete
- error: {"message": "..."} -- on failure
- limit_reached: {"reason": "turn_limit", "turns_used": N, "turn_limit": N} -- turn limit exceeded

get.description: List all format guides for a prompt.

schema.title: Response List Format Guides Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Format Guides Get

put.description:
Create or update a format guide for a specific tool.

Validates that at least 1 example is provided and each example
is valid JSON. Upserts: updates if exists, creates if not.

delete.description: Delete a format guide for a specific tool.

schema.title: Response Delete Format Guide Api Prompts  Prompt Id  Format Guides  Tool Name  Delete

post.description:
Generate a sample mock response using the LLM tool mocker.

Loads the format guide for the specified tool from the database,
creates an LLMMocker with the configured provider/model, and
generates a preview response.

ModelInfo.title: ModelInfo
ModelInfo.description:
Normalized model metadata returned by the /api/models endpoint.

Fields:
    id: Value passed to model= in API calls (e.g. "gemini-2.5-pro").
    name: Human-readable display name (e.g. "Gemini 2.5 Pro").
    context_length: Maximum input token limit, if known.
    input_price_per_mtok: USD per 1M input tokens (OpenRouter only).
    output_price_per_mtok: USD per 1M output tokens (OpenRouter only).
    provider: Source provider ("openrouter" or "gemini").

PromptConfigResponse.title: PromptConfigResponse
PromptConfigResponse.description:
Response from GET/PUT /api/prompts/{id}/config.

Contains effective (merged) values per role and the raw overrides dict
so the UI can show Global/Override provenance badges.

PromptConfigSchema.title: PromptConfigSchema
PromptConfigSchema.description:
Schema for config.json sidecar file.

Contains per-prompt configuration overrides that get merged
onto the global GeneConfig via load_prompt_config.

All fields are optional (None = use global default). The to_json()
method uses exclude_none to keep config.json files clean and
backward-compatible with existing prompts.
